tasks.subject: Task 1: predictor crate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure EWMA prediction with Insufficient/Uncertain/Confident warm-up state machine. No I/O, no tokio, no logging above debug.

**Files:**
- Create: crates/predictor/Cargo.toml
- Create: crates/predictor/src/lib.rs
- Modify: Cargo.toml (workspace members + workspace deps)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- predict() returns Insufficient for first 15 min after window_reset OR < 10 history events.
- Post-warm-up: Uncertain when EWMA variance > threshold, Confident otherwise.
- eta_to_cap is None iff Insufficient.
- eta_to_reset always present, clamped to zero if past.
- All EWMA / variance constants are named constants with rationale comments.
- Zero imports of tokio/reqwest/notify/tracing above debug.

**Verify:** cargo test -p predictor && cargo clippy -p predictor --all-targets -- -D warnings

Full canonical code + 5 tests in plan §Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/predictor/Cargo.toml","crates/predictor/src/lib.rs","Cargo.toml"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test -p predictor && cargo clippy -p predictor --all-targets -- -D warnings","acceptanceCriteria":["predict returns Insufficient during 15-min warmup","predict returns Insufficient when history < 10 entries","Confident vs Uncertain gated by EWMA variance","eta_to_cap None iff Insufficient","eta_to_reset always present and clamped to zero","no tokio/reqwest/notify imports"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: claude_statusline file IO + payload envelope
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend Track D's claude_statusline with StatuslineFilePayload envelope + atomic write/read.

**Files:**
- Create: crates/claude_statusline/src/payload.rs
- Create: crates/claude_statusline/src/file_io.rs
- Modify: crates/claude_statusline/src/lib.rs (re-exports)
- Modify: crates/claude_statusline/Cargo.toml (serde_json + tempfile dev-dep)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- StatuslineFilePayload { schema_version, captured_at, payload } JSON roundtrips.
- atomic_write_snapshot uses tmp + fsync + rename; preserves existing permissions.
- read_snapshot returns precise enum: FileMissing / Io / ParseError / SchemaDrift.
- All errors include the file path; none include file contents.
- SCHEMA_VERSION = 1 (future bumps are §8 changes).

**Verify:** cargo test -p claude_statusline && cargo clippy -p claude_statusline --all-targets -- -D warnings

Full canonical code + 6 tests in plan §Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/claude_statusline/src/payload.rs","crates/claude_statusline/src/file_io.rs","crates/claude_statusline/src/lib.rs","crates/claude_statusline/Cargo.toml"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test -p claude_statusline && cargo clippy -p claude_statusline --all-targets -- -D warnings","acceptanceCriteria":["StatuslineFilePayload JSON roundtrip","atomic_write_snapshot uses tmp+sync_all+rename","read_snapshot returns precise enum on each failure","SchemaDrift fires on wrong schema_version","unix permissions preserved across write","errors include path but not contents"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: state_coordinator schema additions
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Source::ClaudeStatusline + Snapshot fields (claude_statusline, claude_statusline_error, prediction). Coordinator recomputes prediction inline after JSONL/OAuth merges via a 128-entry history ring. Also extend the hand-crafted json_output DTO so the new fields surface in --json.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/state_coordinator/Cargo.toml
- Modify: crates/state_coordinator/src/messages.rs (Source + SourcePartial)
- Modify: crates/state_coordinator/src/snapshot.rs (fields + merge extension)
- Modify: crates/state_coordinator/src/coordinator.rs (CoordinatorState, VecDeque history, maybe_recompute_prediction)
- Modify: crates/state_coordinator/src/lib.rs (re-export Prediction)
- Modify: crates/state_coordinator/src/test_support.rs (statusline_payload helper)
- Modify: crates/balanze_cli/src/json_output.rs (claude_statusline + prediction cells per spec §4.3)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Source::ClaudeStatusline + SourcePartial::ClaudeStatusline(StatuslineFilePayload); source() exhaustive.
- Snapshot has 3 new fields; empty() initializes all to None.
- merge_partial handles ClaudeStatusline; record_error routes it to claude_statusline_error.
- After successful ClaudeJsonl or ClaudeOAuth merge: push WindowSnapshot into 128-entry ring, set snapshot.prediction.
- json_output.rs exposes claude_statusline + prediction cells per spec §4.3 with session_id redacted unless -v.
- All existing tests still pass.

**Verify:** cargo test -p state_coordinator -p balanze_cli && cargo clippy -p state_coordinator -p balanze_cli --all-targets -- -D warnings

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/state_coordinator/Cargo.toml","crates/state_coordinator/src/messages.rs","crates/state_coordinator/src/snapshot.rs","crates/state_coordinator/src/coordinator.rs","crates/state_coordinator/src/lib.rs","crates/state_coordinator/src/test_support.rs","crates/balanze_cli/src/json_output.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test -p state_coordinator -p balanze_cli && cargo clippy -p state_coordinator -p balanze_cli --all-targets -- -D warnings","acceptanceCriteria":["Source::ClaudeStatusline variant exhaustive","Snapshot has 3 new fields with None defaults","merge_partial handles ClaudeStatusline","record_error routes ClaudeStatusline","coordinator recomputes prediction after JSONL or OAuth merge","history ring capped at 128","json_output.rs exposes claude_statusline + prediction cells per spec §4.3","session_id redacted unless -v","all pre-existing tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: balanze-cli statusline writes snapshot file
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend balanze-cli statusline subcommand to atomically write the payload to <data_dir>/balanze/statusline.snapshot.json after printing. Zero behavior change for users not running --watch.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/balanze_cli/src/main.rs (statusline handler)
- Modify: crates/balanze_cli/Cargo.toml (directories if missing)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Existing statusline behavior unchanged: parse stdin, print human line, exit 0.
- Additionally writes StatuslineFilePayload via claude_statusline::atomic_write_snapshot.
- Write failure logs warn! and exits 0 anyway (must not break Claude Code's statusLine).
- Data dir via directories::ProjectDirs::from("me","oszkar","Balanze").data_dir().
- BALANZE_DATA_DIR_OVERRIDE env var honored for tests; documented in CLI help.

**Verify:** cargo test -p balanze_cli; manual: pipe real captured statusline payload, verify file lands at platform data dir.

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/balanze_cli/src/main.rs","crates/balanze_cli/Cargo.toml"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test -p balanze_cli && cargo clippy -p balanze_cli --all-targets -- -D warnings","acceptanceCriteria":["statusline subcommand still prints human line and exits 0","writes StatuslineFilePayload to data_dir/balanze/statusline.snapshot.json","write failure logs warn! but does not fail the subcommand","BALANZE_DATA_DIR_OVERRIDE honored for tests"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: watcher crate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Live loop. Four notify/poll tasks (JSONL, statusline, OAuth, OpenAI) + 60s safety poll + supervisor. Each holds a StateCoordinatorHandle clone and emits StateMsg::Update. Also adds Settings::oauth_poll_interval_secs (sole consumer).

**Files:**
- Create: crates/watcher/Cargo.toml, src/lib.rs, src/errors.rs, src/supervisor.rs
- Create: src/tasks.rs (mod root) + tasks/{jsonl,statusline,oauth_poll,openai_poll,safety_poll}.rs
- Create: tests/integration.rs
- Modify: Cargo.toml (members + notify=6 to workspace.dependencies)
- Modify: crates/settings/src/lib.rs (add pub oauth_poll_interval_secs: u32, default 300)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Watcher::spawn returns 5 JoinHandles.
- JSONL: notify with 300ms debounce; emits ClaudeJsonl + AnthropicApiCost.
- Statusline: notify on data_dir with 100ms debounce; initial read on startup.
- OAuth: tokio interval (settings.oauth_poll_interval_secs.max(60)) with BackoffPolicy::standard().
- OpenAI: same pattern.
- Safety: 60s ticker re-runs JSONL/statusline/Codex (skips OAuth/OpenAI).
- NotifyExhausted falls back to polling, logged once.
- Settings::oauth_poll_interval_secs default 300, round-trips through settings.json; existing settings tests still pass.
- Integration test: write statusline file into temp data dir, assert coord snapshot reflects within 2s.

**Verify:** cargo test -p watcher -p settings && cargo clippy -p watcher -p settings --all-targets -- -D warnings

```json:metadata
{"files":["Cargo.toml","crates/watcher/Cargo.toml","crates/watcher/src/lib.rs","crates/watcher/src/errors.rs","crates/watcher/src/supervisor.rs","crates/watcher/src/tasks.rs","crates/watcher/src/tasks/jsonl.rs","crates/watcher/src/tasks/statusline.rs","crates/watcher/src/tasks/oauth_poll.rs","crates/watcher/src/tasks/openai_poll.rs","crates/watcher/src/tasks/safety_poll.rs","crates/watcher/tests/integration.rs","crates/settings/src/lib.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test -p watcher -p settings && cargo clippy -p watcher -p settings --all-targets -- -D warnings","acceptanceCriteria":["Watcher::spawn returns 5 JoinHandles","jsonl notify with 300ms debounce","statusline notify with 100ms debounce + initial read","oauth/openai pollers use BackoffPolicy::standard with max(60) floor","safety poll covers codex","NotifyExhausted falls back to polling","Settings::oauth_poll_interval_secs default 300 round-trips","integration test sees statusline propagate within 2s"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: balanze-cli --watch mode
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire --watch flag, add StdoutSink + JsonlSink, run watcher + coordinator, handle SIGINT.

**Files:**
- Create: crates/balanze_cli/src/sinks.rs
- Create: crates/balanze_cli/src/watch_cmd.rs
- Modify: crates/balanze_cli/src/main.rs (flag + dispatch)
- Modify: crates/balanze_cli/Cargo.toml (watcher dep)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `balanze-cli --watch` and `balanze-cli status --watch` both work.
- TTY: ANSI clear + reprint compact view on each on_snapshot, 200ms debounced.
- non-TTY: appends each refresh with --- separator.
- --watch --json: JsonlSink, one Snapshot per line, no debounce.
- Ctrl-C/SIGINT exits cleanly within 1s.

**Verify:** cargo test -p balanze_cli; manual: `cargo run -p balanze_cli -- --watch` shows live refresh; Ctrl-C exits clean.

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/balanze_cli/src/sinks.rs","crates/balanze_cli/src/watch_cmd.rs","crates/balanze_cli/src/main.rs","crates/balanze_cli/Cargo.toml"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test -p balanze_cli && cargo clippy -p balanze_cli --all-targets -- -D warnings","acceptanceCriteria":["--watch flag and status --watch both work","StdoutSink TTY clears + redraws with 200ms debounce","JsonlSink emits one Snapshot per line, no debounce","Ctrl-C exits cleanly within 1s","non-TTY uses --- separator instead of ANSI clear"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Criterion benches + baselines
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Three Criterion benches + committed baseline JSON files. CI unchanged (benches local-only).

**Files:**
- Create: crates/{claude_cost,claude_parser,window}/benches/{compute_cost,incremental_parser,summarize_window}.rs
- Create: crates/{claude_cost,claude_parser,window}/benches/baseline.json
- Modify: each crate's Cargo.toml (criterion dev-dep + [[bench]])
- Modify: root Cargo.toml (criterion=0.5 in workspace.dependencies)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- cargo bench --no-run -p claude_cost -p claude_parser -p window compiles all three.
- Each bench writes baseline.json on --save-baseline.
- Budgets noted as comments: compute_cost <5ms/10k, IncrementalParser <200µs/100 lines, summarize_window <1ms/10k.
- CI workflows NOT touched.

**Verify:** cargo bench --no-run -p claude_cost -p claude_parser -p window; one full `cargo bench -p claude_cost` emits times.

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/claude_cost/benches/compute_cost.rs","crates/claude_parser/benches/incremental_parser.rs","crates/window/benches/summarize_window.rs","crates/claude_cost/benches/baseline.json","crates/claude_parser/benches/baseline.json","crates/window/benches/baseline.json","Cargo.toml"],"verifyCommand":"cargo bench --no-run -p claude_cost -p claude_parser -p window && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings","acceptanceCriteria":["3 benches compile (cargo bench --no-run)","each writes baseline.json on --save-baseline","budgets noted as comments inside each bench","CI workflows untouched"]}
```
